ucs.title: [LLM] BlackCat / ALPHV (Noberus) encryptor execution via --access-token argument
ucs.description: Hunts the Rust-based ALPHV/BlackCat ransomware binary by its mandatory `--access-token <UUID>` parameter combined with the actor's characteristic CLI flags (`--paths`, `--propagated`, `--child`, `--no-prop`, `--no-vm-kill`). The encryptor refuses to run without the operator-supplied token, so this signature is unique to the ALPHV/BlackCat RaaS family and its splinters (Cicada3301).
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where Processes.process="*--access-token*" AND (Processes.process="*--paths*" OR Processes.process="*--propagated*" OR Processes.process="*--child*" OR Processes.process="*--no-prop*" OR Processes.process="*--no-vm-kill*") AND NOT Processes.user="*$" by Processes.dest Processes.user Processes.process_name Processes.process Processes.parent_process_name Processes.process_hash | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | rex field=process "--access-token\s+(?<alphv_access_token>[A-Fa-f0-9]{24,})" | convert ctime(firstTime) ctime(lastTime) | sort - lastTime
ucs.kql:
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(7d)
| where AccountName !endswith "$"
| where ProcessCommandLine has "--access-token"
| where ProcessCommandLine has_any ("--paths", "--propagated", "--child", "--no-prop", "--no-vm-kill", "--no-net", "--drag-and-drop")
| extend AlphvAccessToken = extract(@"--access-token\s+([A-Fa-f0-9]{24,})", 1, ProcessCommandLine)
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName, FileName, FolderPath, SHA256,
          ProcessCommandLine, AlphvAccessToken,
          ParentImage = InitiatingProcessFileName,
          ParentCmd = InitiatingProcessCommandLine,
          IsInitiatingProcessRemoteSession
| order by Timestamp desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| where EventID == 4688
| where Account !endswith "$"
| where CommandLine has "--access-token"
| where CommandLine has_any ("--paths", "--propagated", "--child", "--no-prop", "--no-vm-kill", "--no-net", "--drag-and-drop")
| extend AlphvAccessToken = extract(@"--access-token\s+([A-Fa-f0-9]{24,})", 1, CommandLine)
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, Account, NewProcessName, CommandLine, AlphvAccessToken, ParentProcessName, TokenElevationType
| order by TimeGenerated desc
ucs.sigma_yaml:
title: BlackCat / ALPHV (Noberus) Ransomware Encryptor Execution
id: 9c1e2f12-7a3d-4b1d-bf08-30a16d2f3ab1
status: experimental
description: Detects the ALPHV/BlackCat Rust-based ransomware encryptor by its required --access-token argument combined with characteristic operator flags (--paths/--propagated/--child/--no-prop/--no-vm-kill).
references:
  - https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/security/blog/2022/06/13/the-many-lives-of-blackcat-ransomware/
  - https://www.cisa.gov/news-events/cybersecurity-advisories/aa23-353a
author: SOC Detection Engineering
date: 2024/06/01
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection_token:
    CommandLine|contains: '--access-token'
  selection_flags:
    CommandLine|contains:
      - '--paths'
      - '--propagated'
      - '--child'
      - '--no-prop'
      - '--no-vm-kill'
      - '--no-net'
      - '--drag-and-drop'
  condition: selection_token and selection_flags
falsepositives:
  - Extremely unlikely. The argument-set is unique to ALPHV/BlackCat (and verbatim Cicada3301 fork).
level: critical
tags:
  - attack.impact
  - attack.t1486
  - attack.t1027
ucs.rationale: ALPHV/BlackCat is the first widely-deployed Rust ransomware (Microsoft = `BlackCat`, CrowdStrike's Russian e-crime ecosystem cluster). Its operator manual and every Mandiant/Microsoft/CISA AA23-353A report documents that the encryptor will refuse to execute without `--access-token <hex>` plus a path/propagation flag. No other malware family adopted this CLI shape, so a single-event detection on th

_field_issues.message: `IsInitiatingProcessRemoteSession` is not a canonical column of DeviceProcessEvents. Did you mean `InitiatingProcessTokenElevation`?

ucs.title: [LLM] BlackCat safe-boot pivot: bcdedit /safeboot + shadow-copy + USN-journal wipe on same host
ucs.description: Hunts BlackCat's signature pre-encryption sequence: the operator runs `bcdedit /set {default} safeboot minimal` (or `network`) to force a Safe-Mode reboot that disables most EDR drivers, then wipes Volume Shadow Copies (vssadmin/wmic) and the NTFS USN journal (fsutil) within the same window. CISA #StopRansomware (AA23-353A) and Microsoft (June 2022 BlackCat report) call out this combo as ALPHV-specific.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) as safeboot_first max(_time) as safeboot_last from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where Processes.process_name=bcdedit.exe Processes.process="*safeboot*" (Processes.process="*minimal*" OR Processes.process="*network*") by Processes.dest Processes.user Processes.process Processes.parent_process_name | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | rename process as safeboot_cmd | join type=inner dest [ | tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) as defeat_first max(_time) as defeat_last values(Processes.process) as defeat_cmds from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where (Processes.process_name=vssadmin.exe Processes.process="*delete*shadows*") OR (Processes.process_name=wmic.exe Processes.process="*shadowcopy*delete*") OR (Processes.process_name=fsutil.exe Processes.process="*usn*deletejournal*") OR (Processes.process_name=wevtutil.exe Processes.process="*cl *") by Processes.dest | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` ] | eval delta=abs(defeat_first - safeboot_first) | where delta <= 1800 | convert ctime(safeboot_first) ctime(defeat_first) | table dest user safeboot_cmd safeboot_first defeat_cmds defeat_first delta
ucs.kql:
let Window = 30m;
let Safeboot =
    DeviceProcessEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(7d)
    | where AccountName !endswith "$"
    | where FileName =~ "bcdedit.exe"
    | where ProcessCommandLine has "safeboot"
    | where ProcessCommandLine has_any ("minimal", "network")
    | project SafeTime = Timestamp, DeviceId, DeviceName, AccountName,
              SafebootCmd = ProcessCommandLine;
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(7d)
| where AccountName !endswith "$"
| where (FileName =~ "vssadmin.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has_all ("delete","shadows"))
     or (FileName =~ "wmic.exe"     and ProcessCommandLine has_all ("shadowcopy","delete"))
     or (FileName =~ "fsutil.exe"   and ProcessCommandLine has_all ("usn","deletejournal"))
     or (FileName =~ "wevtutil.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has "cl ")
| join kind=inner Safeboot on DeviceId
| where Timestamp between ((SafeTime - Window) .. (SafeTime + Window))
| project DeviceName, AccountName,
          SafeTime, SafebootCmd,
          DefeatTime = Timestamp,
          DefeatBinary = FileName,
          DefeatCmd = ProcessCommandLine,
          DeltaSec = datetime_diff('second', Timestamp, SafeTime),
          ParentBinary = InitiatingProcessFileName,
          ParentCmd = InitiatingProcessCommandLine
| order by SafeTime desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
let Window = 30m;
let Safeboot =
    SecurityEvent
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
    | where EventID == 4688
    | where Account !endswith "$"
    | where NewProcessName endswith "bcdedit.exe"
    | where CommandLine has "safeboot"
    | where CommandLine has_any ("minimal", "network")
    | project SafeTime = TimeGenerated, Computer, Account,
              SafebootCmd = CommandLine;
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| where EventID == 4688
| where Account !endswith "$"
| where (NewProcessName endswith "vssadmin.exe" and CommandLine has "delete" and CommandLine has "shadows")
     or (NewProcessName endswith "wmic.exe"     and CommandLine has "shadowcopy" and CommandLine has "delete")
     or (NewProcessName endswith "fsutil.exe"   and CommandLine has "usn" and CommandLine has "deletejournal")
     or (NewProcessName endswith "wevtutil.exe" and CommandLine has "cl ")
| join kind=inner Safeboot on Computer
| where TimeGenerated between ((SafeTime - Window) .. (SafeTime + Window))
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, Account,
          SafeTime, SafebootCmd,
          DefeatBinary = NewProcessName,
          DefeatCmd = CommandLine,
          DeltaSec = datetime_diff('second', TimeGenerated, SafeTime),
          ParentProcessName
| order by SafeTime desc
ucs.rationale: BlackCat (ALPHV / Noberus) is one of the only RaaS crews that systematically uses Safe-Mode boot to defeat EDR before encryption — Microsoft's June 2022 ALPHV report and CISA AA23-353A both highlight `bcdedit /set safeboot minimal` paired with shadow-copy and USN-journal destruction as the actor's hallmark. The 30-minute correlated chain on a single host is too narrow to be operations-noise (legit
